channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th July
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fotheringham Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Toaster dumped on pavement, 11th July
item.description:
Someone's left this small metal toaster on the pavement, no note to suggest it's being given away.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two bed frames left on pavement, 11th July
item.description:
There have been two slatted single bed frames on the pavement here for around a week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old furniture on grass, 11th July
item.description:
Again fly tipping of furniture, just had the area cleaned up !!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22A,22B,22C,22D, Sholden Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two forest bikes left in middle of pavement, 11th July
item.description:
Two bikes, one on its side, blocking the pavement near Penge East station. Very dangerous for visually impaired people.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 226, Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 11th July
item.description:
Mayow Road Remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayow Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Flytipping in the car park on Chipstead Close, 11th July
item.description:
Flytipping in the car park on Chipstead Close. The rubbish was dumped in the last couple of days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Anerley Grove, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in bin bag, 11th July
item.description:
We have placed a deceased fox in black bin liners in alleyway for collection/ disposal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fashoda Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Animal like Dog or Fox, 11th July
item.description:
Dead Animal like Dog or Fox is at the car park. Entrance is from Beatrice Road in the Resident Car Park behind St. James Road. Parking is for resident at St. James Road and Kotree Way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Simms Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fl;y Tipping, 11th July
item.description:
A metal and glass storage box with broken panes of glass. This is outside of Grazebrook Nursery and is a danger to small children

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grayling Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th July
item.description:
The fly tipping has been slowly getting bigger and most of it is not from the flats. It’s from the housing association on Beatrice Road. And cars just pull and off load and go

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Strathnairn Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal and plastic, 11th July
item.description:
People keep dumping their rubbish instead of taking it to the tip. Could become trip hazard been there over a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakhouse Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th July
item.description:
Rubbish piled up by road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cross Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime Bike Dumping Ground on Tanner Street, 11th July
item.description:
Well over a dozen Lime Bikes are blocking the pavement and the entrance to a block of flats at 51 Tanner St (SE1 3PL).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Tanner Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on pavement outside 7 Grove Park Road, 11th July
item.description:
This will attract copycat activity
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Grove Park Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow box junction signage needs an urgent review as the lack of effective junction signage presents a dangerous, chaotic and congested traffic environment for all road users and pedestrians alike who traverse this intersection., 11th July
item.description:
Yellow box junction signage needs an urgent review as the lack of effective junction signage presents a dangerous, chaotic and congested traffic environment for all road users and pedestrians alike who traverse this intersection.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow box junction signage needs an urgent review as the lack of effective junction signage presents a dangerous, chaotic and congested traffic environment for all road users and pedestrians alike who traverse this intersection., 11th July
item.description:
Yellow box junction signage needs an urgent review as the lack of effective junction signage presents a dangerous, chaotic and congested traffic environment for all road users and pedestrians alike who traverse this intersection.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 families continuously littering on the green - every evening, 11th July
item.description:
There are 2 families and their friends that sit on the green every afternoon and evening it's sunny. They're constantly littering - bottles, food packets and dangerously - cigarettes (the grass is very dry at the moment). Not using new bins
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodmill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 big potholes still here & drainhole sinking, 11th July
item.description:
4 big potholes still here & drainholesinking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Girton Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 11th July
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London
